hypothesis: Reactor fresh-token spend per tick is driven by the PREREGISTERED material-change indicator, not by tick count (wall-clock/event-count).
null_hypothesis: Per-tick fresh spend is independent of the material-change indicator (spend tracks wall-clock / event-count).

decision_rule.test: pooled per-tick OLS of fresh ~ materially_changed (0/1); slope = mean(fresh|material) - mean(fresh|immaterial)
decision_rule.significance: seeded permutation test (10000 shuffles, mulberry32 seed=fixed) on |slope|; reject null at p < 0.01
decision_rule.headline_form: At lambda=L, Reactor spends ~Nx fewer fresh tokens than an equal-correctness cron; its spend scales ~linearly through the origin with the change rate while the cron's stays flat.
decision_rule.equal_correctness_gate: a cost row is reportable ONLY where the contestant's maintained-truth trajectory matches the oracle (== oracle-cron correctness).

model_pin: openrouter:openai/gpt-5.4-mini (live cell only; offline uses deterministic-cost-v1)

cost_surrogate.workWeight: 0 for mechanical gateway/normalizer nodes, 1 for model-bearing maintainer nodes
cost_surrogate.note: Pure in byte inputs; monotone non-decreasing in (upstreamBytes + outputBytes); a skip emits a zero-fresh receipt via the reconciler, never via this function.
